overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a vibrant futuristic city with neon-lit commercial buildings, transitioning from covered walkways to open plazas and narrow back alleys.

large curved digital display showing advertisements
rectangular planter with palm trees and greenery

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered pedestrian walkway characterized by a vibrant pink building facade on the left with large digital billboards. Palm trees in rectangular planters line the center path while pedestrians walk in various directions beneath a glass canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with outdoor dining under Kabayan Foods

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza passing by outdoor dining tables

white and red plastic chairs and tables arranged for dining
tree with pink blossoms in planter box
elevated walkway connecting buildings with glass railings

segments.scene_description: Entering an open sunlit plaza beneath a prominent red 'Kabayan Foods' sign. The area features outdoor dining with white plastic chairs where NPCs are seated, cherry blossom trees, and elevated pedestrian walkways connecting the surrounding futuristic buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: waiting at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by
blue pickup truck drives past closely while crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the city street while navigating between moving vehicles

segments.scene_description: Navigating a busy city intersection with moving futuristic traffic. The camera crosses the street while a blue pickup truck passes by, with a prominent 'Big Shark Fugu Sushi' neon sign visible on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with closed storefronts and debris

events.description: enters narrow alley with closed metal shutters and accumulated trash

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow alley passing closed shops and debris

entered.detail: rolled-down metal security shutters on storefronts
large green industrial waste containers with debris
red and green automated vending machines
circular purple neon sign on the right wall

segments.scene_description: Walking down a narrow urban alleyway lined with closed metal storefront shutters and green dumpsters. The area features vending machines and neon signage with fewer pedestrians, creating a more secluded atmosphere compared to the busy plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, sheltered commercial corridor into the bustling open city and finally into a secluded urban alley. It begins along a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a glass canopy, passing a pink building facade with digital billboards and palm trees in planters. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza featuring cherry blossom trees and outdoor dining areas beneath a prominent red Kabayan Foods sign. The movement then carries the viewer across a busy city intersection filled with futuristic traffic and a blue pickup truck, passing a neon Big Shark Fugu Sushi sign on the right. Finally, the environment shifts from the bright, crowded street into a narrow, quiet alleyway lined with green dumpsters, vending machines, and closed metal shutters.
